I mean, it looks like they too have a mix of like, this looks like a listicle, but they also probably have some like high kind of effort, deep dives.
Yeah.
Yeah.
And things like dev.to are going to be filled with a ton of different listicles because they get a lot of content.
But depending on what squad you follow, you can get some good information in here.
Cool.
That's a click.
That'll be a good source.
Great.
So yeah, expect something on the integration pages soon.
And then on the editorial blog side, we'll start with just a bit more structure around our keyword strategy.
And then I'll probably schedule a call with you, Luke.
Sounds good.
or early next week.
Cool.
Works for me.
All right.
Thank you, guys.
It was nice to meet you.
Yeah.
Nice to meet you as well.
Have a good rest of your week.
See ya.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webflow and GrowthX to discuss integration pages, content strategy, and developer-focused content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integration pages need more specific, actionable guidance and less reliance on external links](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Content strategy requires clearer differentiation between SEO-focused and developer-focused articles](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [Developer blog content should aim for high quality, potentially "Hacker News worthy" material](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [Team will refine approach to content pillars, considering placement (dev blog vs. main blog) and target audience](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

## Topics

### Integration Page Improvements

  - [Current pages rely too heavily on external links and general concepts](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Need to provide more actionable, step-by-step guidance for integrations](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Will include more specific code snippets and implementation details where possible](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Team to focus on well-documented, brand-name integrations first before tackling long-tail options](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Developing a pillar and cluster structure for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Need to clearly differentiate between SEO-focused content and developer-education content](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [Consider separating content placement: dev blog for high-quality, technical pieces; main blog for more general, SEO-driven articles](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Team to add a column in content planning to specify which "hub" (dev blog or main blog) each piece will live in](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

### Developer-Focused Content Quality

  - [Aim for "Hacker News worthy" quality for dev blog content](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [Short, focused articles with code examples can still provide high value](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Balance needed between SEO goals and creating genuinely educational developer content](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Team to explore daily.dev and similar platforms for content ideas and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=2115.0)

### Webflow Project Setup

  - [GrowthX team has set up a Webflow project for integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Waiting on style guide and design standardization from Webflow team](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Meg to help coordinate with internal Webflow teams for site setup and shared libraries](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to deliver next batch of revised integration pages by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [Webflow team to provide access to workspace for GrowthX team members](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Meg to coordinate with Corey and Alexander on Webflow site setup and style guide implementation](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Jason to schedule a call with Luke to discuss developer content strategy in more depth](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
  - [Team to refine content pillar strategy, clearly defining placement and target audience for each piece](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [Explore daily.dev as a potential source for developer content ideas and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/86ZXxKJ-Mtze6LyGFTkx1LhDJQCzhzy3?tab=summary&timestamp=2115.0)

action_items.description: Compile & send customer software usage data to Jason by Monday
Create new batch of integration pages for review by Friday
Connect w/ Corey & Alexander re: implementing style guides & shared libraries for integration pages
Send team email addresses to Jason for Webflow workspace access
Revise content pillar strategy; add column for article location (dev vs main blog)
Schedule call w/ Luke re: developer content strategy
